Package pt.gov.cartaodecidadao

Interface PTEID_SigningDevice

All Known Implementing Classes:
PTEID_Card, PTEID_CMDSignatureClient, PTEID_EIDCard, PTEID_SigningDeviceProxy, PTEID_SmartCard
